panels.description: Total GC registrations in the selected time range.
panels.title: GC Registrations

panels.description: Total GC heartbeats (load reports) in the selected time range.
panels.title: GC Heartbeats

panels.description: Total token refresh attempts in the selected time range.
panels.title: Token Refreshes

panels.description: GC registration count by status (success/error) over time.
panels.title: GC Registration Count by Status

panels.description: GC registration RPC latency percentiles (p50, p95, p99).
panels.title: GC Registration Latency (P50/P95/P99)

panels.description: GC heartbeat (load report) count by status (success/error) over time.
panels.title: GC Heartbeat Count by Status

panels.description: GC heartbeat RPC latency percentiles (p50, p95, p99).
panels.title: GC Heartbeat Latency (P50/P95/P99)

panels.description: Token refresh count by status (success/error) over time.
panels.title: Token Refresh Count by Status

panels.description: Token refresh latency percentiles (p50, p95, p99).
panels.title: Token Refresh Latency (P50/P95/P99)

panels.description: Current number of active WebTransport connections.
panels.title: Active Connections

panels.description: Total WebTransport connections in the selected time range.
panels.title: WebTransport Connections (Total)

panels.description: Total JWT validations in the selected time range.
panels.title: JWT Validations (Total)

panels.description: WebTransport connection count by status (accepted/rejected/error) over time.
panels.title: WebTransport Connections by Status

panels.description: WebTransport handshake latency percentiles (p50, p95, p99). Measures session accept through JWT validation.
panels.title: Handshake Latency (P50/P95/P99)

panels.description: JWT validation count by result (success/failure) and token type over time.
panels.title: JWT Validations by Result

panels.description: Caller service_type rejections by Layer 2 routing (ADR-0003). Any non-zero value indicates a bug or misconfiguration.
panels.title: Caller Type Rejections (ADR-0003)

panels.description: Count of provisional WebTransport connections disconnected because RegisterMeeting did not arrive within the configured timeout (R-26). Non-zero values indicate MC->MH RegisterMeeting latency or client-side sequencing bugs. Task 12 will expand with alerting/thresholds.
panels.title: RegisterMeeting Timeouts (R-26)

panels.description: MH error rate grouped by operation (registration / heartbeat / grpc_service) and error_type (grpc / not_registered / config / internal / token_acquisition / token_acquisition_timeout). Operation dimension answers the first triage question "which operation is broken?" at a glance. status_code label intentionally dropped from grouping (cross-product noise for an overview).
panels.title: Errors by Type

panels.description: Inbound gRPC request volume from MC by method (register / route_media / stream_telemetry) and status. MC->MH RPC health.
panels.title: Incoming gRPC Requests by Method/Status

panels.description: MH to MC connect/disconnect notification delivery by event (connected / disconnected) and status (success / error). Drives MC's participant presence state. Alert: MHMCNotificationFailures fires on sustained error rate >10%.
panels.title: MH->MC Notification Delivery by Event/Status

panels.description: Breakdown of OAuth token refresh failures by error_type (http / auth_rejected / invalid_response / acquisition_failed / configuration / channel_closed). Complements the aggregate Token Refresh Count by Status panel (id 8): id-8 shows pass/fail volume, this panel shows which failure mode dominates for triage. Alert: MHTokenRefreshFailures.
panels.title: Token Refresh Failures by Error Type
